segment.source: Search With #
segment.target: Search With #

segment.source: Author: Ibrahim Hamadeh
segment.target: Author: Ibrahim Hamadeh

segment.source: Download [Version 1.2][1]
segment.target: Download [Version 1.2][1]

segment.source: NVDA compatibility: 2019.3 and beyond
segment.target: NVDA compatibility: 2019.3 and beyond

segment.source: This addon helps you to search text, via various search engines.
segment.target: This addon helps you to search text, via various search engines.

segment.source: Let no text selected, and press the gesture of the addon
segment.target: Let no text selected, and press the gesture of the addon

segment.source: A dialog will be displayed, with an edit box to enter a search query
segment.target: A dialog will be displayed, with an edit box to enter a search query

segment.source: To search with Google press enter, or tab to search with other engins.
segment.target: To search with Google press enter, or tab to search with other engins.

segment.source: Or
segment.target: Or

segment.source: select some text and press once, a menu will be displayed with various search engines to choose.
segment.target: select some text and press once, a menu will be displayed with various search engines to choose.

segment.source: And while text is selected, you can press the gesture twice to search with Google directly.
segment.target: And while text is selected, you can press the gesture twice to search with Google directly.

segment.source: The Default gesture for the addon is: NVDA+ Windows+ S.
segment.target: The Default gesture for the addon is: NVDA+ Windows+ S.

segment.source: If the keystroke do not work for you, or conflict with other keystroke,
segment.target: If the keystroke do not work for you, or conflict with other keystroke,

segment.source: you can as always add a gesture or change the existent one going to :
segment.target: you can as always add a gesture or change the existent one going to :

segment.source: NVDA menu>preferences>inputGestures>Search With category.
segment.target: NVDA menu>preferences>inputGestures>Search With category.

segment.source: Usage ##
segment.target: Usage ##

segment.source: If you want to enter a search query, just press the addon gesture
segment.target: If you want to enter a search query, just press the addon gesture

segment.source: A dialog will be displayed, with an edit field to enter the search term.
segment.target: A dialog will be displayed, with an edit field to enter the search term.

segment.source: Want to search with Google? just press enter
segment.target: Want to search with Google? just press enter

segment.source: Otherwise tab to Other Engines button, and give it a space
segment.target: Otherwise tab to Other Engines button, and give it a space

segment.source: A popup menu will show up, with various search engines to choose.
segment.target: A popup menu will show up, with various search engines to choose.

segment.source: Yahoo, Bing, DuckDuckGo, and Youtube.
segment.target: Yahoo, Bing, DuckDuckGo, and Youtube.

segment.source: This is the default menu, and you may modify it from addon's setting panel.
segment.target: This is the default menu, and you may modify it from addon's setting panel.

segment.source: Another way to use the addon, is by selecting some text
segment.target: Another way to use the addon, is by selecting some text

segment.source: And on Pressing the addon's gesture, or any other you have assigned to it
segment.target: And on Pressing the addon's gesture, or any other you have assigned to it

segment.source: a virtual menu will be displayed with various search engines
segment.target: a virtual menu will be displayed with various search engines

segment.source: Either the default menu, or any other you have tailed to your needs.
segment.target: Either the default menu, or any other you have tailed to your needs.

segment.source: Choose one and press enter, the default browser will open displaying search results.
segment.target: Choose one and press enter, the default browser will open displaying search results.

segment.source: Or, if you want to search with Google directly
segment.target: Or, if you want to search with Google directly

segment.source: press the gesture twice, and you are done.
segment.target: press the gesture twice, and you are done.

segment.source: Want to modify Search with menu?
segment.target: Want to modify Search with menu?

segment.source: Yes you can do that from the setting panel, and adjust the menu to fit to your mood and needs.
segment.target: Yes you can do that from the setting panel, and adjust the menu to fit to your mood and needs.

segment.source: You can from there, add to Search with menu, other available search engines
segment.target: You can from there, add to Search with menu, other available search engines

segment.source: And you can if you like, remove an item from it, move item up, move item down, or return and set it to default state.
segment.target: And you can if you like, remove an item from it, move item up, move item down, or return and set it to default state.

segment.source: If you want these modifications to be permanent, you have to save configuration after wards.
segment.target: If you want these modifications to be permanent, you have to save configuration after wards.

segment.source: Want to search Google using other language options?
segment.target: Want to search Google using other language options?

segment.source: Go to, Search With category in setting panels
segment.target: Go to, Search With category in setting panels

segment.source: From the cumbo box there, you can choose search Google either:
segment.target: From the cumbo box there, you can choose search Google either:

segment.source: Using browser settings and language.
segment.target: Using browser settings and language.

segment.source: Using NVDA language.
segment.target: Using NVDA language.

segment.source: Using windows language.
segment.target: Using windows language.

segment.source: Lastly, if you want to have last spoken text as default query in Search with dialog
segment.target: Lastly, if you want to have last spoken text as default query in Search with dialog

segment.source: you have the ability to do that, through Use last spoken as default query check box in setting panel.
segment.target: you have the ability to do that, through Use last spoken as default query check box in setting panel.

segment.source: And that's it, hope to search for good and find it, happy searching!
segment.target: And that's it, hope to search for good and find it, happy searching!

segment.source: Changes for 1.2 ###
segment.target: Changes for 1.2 ###

segment.source: Add translations for Portuguese (Brazil), Portuguese (Portugal), and Turkish.
segment.target: Add translations for Portuguese (Brazil), Portuguese (Portugal), and Turkish.

segment.source: Add translations for Chinese (Simplified, China)
segment.target: Add translations for Chinese (Simplified, China)

segment.source: Changes for 0.7 ###
segment.target: Changes for 0.7 ###

segment.source: Add more sites that could be added to menu, such as Stackoverflow, Stackexchange, GoogleBooks and others.
segment.target: Add more sites that could be added to menu, such as Stackoverflow, Stackexchange, GoogleBooks and others.

segment.source: Add the options to use last spoken text as default query, in search with dialog.
segment.target: Add the options to use last spoken text as default query, in search with dialog.

segment.source: Changes for 0.4 ###
segment.target: Changes for 0.4 ###

segment.source: Add a dialog if no text selected, to enter a search query.
segment.target: Add a dialog if no text selected, to enter a search query.

segment.source: Make possible to modify Search with menu from setting panel, to fit to user needs.
segment.target: Make possible to modify Search with menu from setting panel, to fit to user needs.

segment.source: Changes for 0.3 ###
segment.target: Changes for 0.3 ###

segment.source: Add setting panel, giving more language options in Google search.
segment.target: Add setting panel, giving more language options in Google search.

segment.source: Changes for 0.1 ###
segment.target: Changes for 0.1 ###

segment.source: Initial version
segment.target: Initial version

segment.source: [1]: https://github.com/ibrahim-s/searchWith/releases/download/v1.2/searchWith-1.2.nvda-addon
segment.target: [1]: https://github.com/ibrahim-s/searchWith/releases/download/v1.2/searchWith-1.2.nvda-addon
